## Security and licensing checklist

- [ ] All commits include a DCO `Signed-off-by` line.
- [ ] I have the right to submit this contribution under Apache-2.0.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, credentials, private prompts, or run logs.
- [ ] I disclosed the source and license of any third-party material.
- [ ] I disclosed material use of AI tools and reviewed the resulting code.
- [ ] I considered command execution, file access, web/MCP exposure, and stored data.
